zh:
目标轴: %s · token: %.0fM · 质量 q: %.2f
同轴多份按 token 加权合并 (q̄ = Σ q·size / Σ size) 后统一结算;
目标轴朝软天花板饱和; 堆份数/拆碎都不再刷分, 只能靠更大基座抬天花板。
q 越高净分越稳 (gain∝q̄², forget∝1-q̄); 实际累加见下方预览。
en:
Target axis: %s · token: %.0fM · quality q: %.2f
Same-axis copies are token-weighted (q̄ = Σ q·size / Σ size) then settled together;
target axis saturates toward a soft cap — splitting/stacking no longer grinds score, only a bigger base raises the cap.
Higher q means steadier net (gain∝q̄², forget∝1-q̄); see preview below.

zh: 你是一家 AI 公司的创始人
en: You're the founder of an AI lab

zh: 你的目标: 把模型做强、做出产品、赚到钱, 再把钱投回研发, 滚起飞轮。\n游戏每周一回合。安排好这一周的事 (招人 / 买算力 / 开训练 / 上产品) 后, 点顶栏的「推进回合」, 这一周就会结算: 任务推进、产生营收、扣掉开销。\n顶栏随时显示你的回合、现金、周净现金流、付费用户和算力。
en: Your goal: build strong models, ship products, make money, then reinvest it into R&D to spin up the flywheel.\nThe game runs one turn per week. Line up what you want this week (hire / buy compute / start training / launch a product), then hit Advance Turn in the top bar to settle the week: tasks progress, revenue comes in, costs go out.\nThe top bar always shows your turn, cash, weekly net cash flow, paid users and compute.

zh:
做强模型是公司的根基, 大致流程:
· 招人: 在「招聘」雇 lead 和员工, 他们的专长决定训练加成。
· 算力: 在「基建」建机房、买 GPU、选供电, 这是训练的硬件底子。
· 数据: 在「数据」获取数据集 (开源 / 购买 / 采集), 训练时会被占用。
· 开训练: 在「模型」点训练新模型, 选架构 / 规模 / 数据, 启动一个训练任务。
· 推进回合: 训练要跑若干周, 完成后得到模型; 还要「评估」才能看到真实能力, 满意就「发布」。
en:
Strong models are the foundation. The rough flow:
· Hire: in Hiring, recruit leads and staff — their specialties give training bonuses.
· Compute: in Infra, build datacenters, buy GPUs and pick power — the hardware your training runs on.
· Data: in Data, get datasets (open-source / purchase / collect); they're locked while training.
· Start training: in Models, start a new model — choose architecture / size / data to kick off a training task.
· Advance turns: training takes several weeks; when done you get the model. Evaluate it to reveal its real capabilities, then Publish.

zh:
模型只有变成产品才会赚钱:
· 创建产品: 在「产品」用一个已发布的模型创建产品 (聊天助手 / API 等), 模型越强, 产品上限越高。
· 获取用户: 产品上线后吸引用户; 在「营销」投放可加速增长, 定价影响付费转化。
· 产生营收: 用户带来周营收, 在「营收」能看到收入构成。
· 持续影响: 换上更强的模型、研究相关科技、调整定价与营销, 都会改变它的表现。
· 飞轮: 把营收投回招人 / 算力 / 研究, 做出更强的模型和产品。
en:
Models only make money once they become products:
· Create a product: in Products, build a product (assistant / API, etc.) on a published model — a stronger model raises the product's ceiling.
· Get users: a launched product attracts users; Marketing campaigns speed up growth, and pricing affects paid conversion.
· Earn revenue: users bring weekly revenue — see the breakdown in Revenue.
· Keep shaping it: swap in a stronger model, research relevant tech, and tune pricing & marketing to change how it performs.
· Flywheel: reinvest revenue into hiring / compute / research to build even better models and products.

zh: 迷路了不用慌。右侧导航最下方的「帮助」里, 有每个系统怎么玩的说明, 随时可以点开看。\n准备好了就点「开始游戏」, 开启你的 Scaling Up 之路。
en: Lost? No worries. The Help entry at the bottom of the right-hand navigation explains how each system works — open it any time.\nWhen you're ready, hit Start and begin your Scaling Up journey.

zh: 游戏以「周」为回合。你在一周内做决策 (招人 / 训练 / 产品 / 研究 / 捐助...), 然后点顶栏「推进回合」结算这一周。\n结算时: 进行中的任务推进进度、产品产生营收、扣除工资与运营开销、按规则收税。\n有未处理的事件时无法推进, 先去「事件」处理。
en: The game advances one week per turn. You make decisions during the week (hiring, training, products, research, donations...), then click Advance Turn in the top bar to settle it.\nOn settlement: in-progress tasks advance, products earn revenue, salaries and operating costs are deducted, and taxes apply on schedule.\nYou can't advance while events are pending — handle them in Events first.

zh: 在「模型」训练并管理模型。新模型经历四个阶段: 预训练 → (可选) 后训练 → 评估 → 发布。\n训练时选架构族、模型规模、注意力 / Loss / 上下文等轴, 以及要喂的数据集; 规模和数据越大越强, 但更贵、更慢、更吃算力。\n训练完成的模型必须「评估」后才显示真实能力; 满意就「发布」, 之后才能拿去支撑产品。
en: Train and manage models in Models. A new model goes through four stages: pretrain → (optional) post-train → evaluate → publish.\nWhen training you pick an architecture family, model size, the attention / loss / context axes, and the datasets to feed it; bigger size and more data make a stronger model but cost more, take longer and need more compute.\nA finished model must be Evaluated before its true capabilities show; Publish it when satisfied so it can back a product.

zh: 在「产品」用已发布模型创建产品。产品类型 (如聊天助手 / API / 行业应用) 有不同的解锁条件与用户/营收特征。\n产品靠模型能力吸引用户, 用户按定价转化为付费, 形成周营收 (在「营收」看构成)。\n想提升产品: 换更强的模型、研究相关科技、调整定价、在「营销」投放拉新。
en: In Products, create a product on a published model. Product types (assistant / API / vertical app...) have different unlock requirements and user/revenue profiles.\nProducts attract users via model capability; users convert to paying customers based on price, producing weekly revenue (see Revenue for the breakdown).\nTo improve a product: swap in a stronger model, research relevant tech, tune pricing, and run Marketing campaigns to grow.

zh: 「经济」是钱的中枢。现金可以为负, 但赤字太久会破产 (游戏结束)。\n开销: 工资、运营、税。收入: 产品营收、出租闲置算力等。\n缺钱时可在「经济」借贷 (要还本付息) 或发起融资轮 (出让股权换现金, 创始人持股有下限)。周度财报和上周收支明细也在这里。
en: Economy is the money hub. Cash can go negative, but staying in deficit too long means bankruptcy (game over).\nCosts: salaries, operations, taxes. Income: product revenue, renting out idle compute, etc.\nWhen short on cash, take a loan in Economy (repaid with interest) or raise a funding round (trade equity for cash; your founder stake has a floor). Weekly financials and last week's ledger live here too.

zh: 在「招聘」雇人, 在「员工」管理在册人员。\nLead 是具名骨干, 有不同专长 (预训练 / 后训练 / 研究 / 营销...), 给对应任务加成; 员工是按角色聚合的人力 (如工程师), 任务会占用空闲员工。\n雇人要付签字费, 每周还要发工资 —— 别让薪资压垮现金流。你本人作为创始人也在 leads 里, 免费且不可解雇。
en: Recruit in Hiring; manage your roster in Staff.\nLeads are named key people with specialties (pretrain / post-train / research / marketing...) that boost matching tasks; staff are role-based headcount (e.g. engineers) that tasks consume when idle.\nHiring costs a signing fee plus weekly salary — don't let payroll crush your cash flow. You, the founder, are also in the leads list: free and can't be fired.

zh: 在「基建」搭建你的算力。两种资产配套: 机房 (决定容量 / 场地档位) + GPU (单独购买, 一个机房只装一种型号)。\n还要选供电方式, 它影响电费、集群效率和声誉。算力 (FLOPs / 每秒 token) 决定你能训多大的模型、跑多快。\n闲置的自有算力可以对外出租赚钱; 公共开源模型也能在这里直接部署做推理服务。
en: Build your compute in Infra. Two paired assets: datacenters (set capacity / site tier) and GPUs (bought separately; one datacenter holds a single GPU type).\nYou also choose how it's powered, which affects electricity cost, cluster efficiency and reputation. Compute (FLOPs / tokens-per-sec) sets how big a model you can train and how fast.\nIdle owned compute can be rented out for income, and public open models can be served for inference right here.

zh: 在「数据」获取训练用的数据。三种来源: 开源 (便宜、质量一般)、购买 (现成、要钱)、采集 (自己开任务攒, 可选模态与质量档)。\n每份数据集有规模 (token 数)、质量和模态 (文本 / 图像 / 音频 / 视频 / 代码)。训练时数据会被该任务锁定。\n预训练吃海量原始 token; 后训练是少量高质量数据, 用来定向拉高某个能力轴。
en: Get training data in Data. Three sources: open-source (cheap, average quality), purchase (ready-made, costs money), and collection (run a task to gather it yourself, choosing modality and quality tier).\nEach dataset has a size (tokens), quality and modality (text / image / audio / video / code). Data is locked by a task while it trains.\nPretraining eats huge raw token counts; post-training uses small high-quality data to sharpen a specific capability axis.

zh: 在「科技」研究技术节点, 永久提升你的能力。节点分多棵树 (架构 / 注意力 / Loss / 工程 / 应用 / 上下文), 有前置依赖, 解锁后给训练或推理带来加成 (如更长上下文、更高吞吐)。\n研究本身也是一个任务: 要投入 lead / 研究员 / 工程师和算力, 持续若干周, 期间占用算力, 且不可逆。\n注意有些方向是历史死路 (看似有纵深, 评分却被封顶), 选路要想清楚。
en: Research tech nodes in Tech for permanent upgrades. Nodes sit in several trees (architecture / attention / loss / engineering / application / context) with prerequisites; unlocking one boosts training or inference (longer context, higher throughput, etc.).\nResearch is itself a task: it needs leads / researchers / engineers and compute, runs for several weeks, ties up that compute, and is irreversible.\nNote some branches are historical dead ends (they look deep but their score is capped) — choose your path carefully.

zh: 在「营销」为产品投放营销活动, 加速用户增长。\n活动按周扣预算、需要营销员工, 不同细分受众 / 渠道效果不同; 营销做得好能放大产品获客, 但烧钱, 要和现金流平衡。\n营销加成不是永久的 —— 停投后增长会回落到产品自身的吸引力水平。
en: Run marketing campaigns for your products in Marketing to accelerate user growth.\nCampaigns spend a weekly budget and need marketing staff; different audience segments / channels perform differently. Good marketing amplifies a product's customer acquisition, but it burns cash — balance it against your cash flow.\nMarketing boosts aren't permanent — once you stop, growth falls back to the product's own pull.

zh: 在「竞争对手」查看你和其他 AI 公司的排名。分两类榜单: 闭源模型榜和开源模型榜, 各按已发布模型的能力排座次。\n对手会随时间推出更强的模型, 把你挤下去; 你的排名影响声誉, 进而影响获客与融资。\n想往上爬, 就持续发布更强的模型、保持领先。
en: See how you rank against other AI companies in Competitors. There are two boards — closed-source and open-source models — each ranking published models by capability.\nRivals release stronger models over time and can push you down; your rank affects reputation, which in turn affects customer acquisition and funding.\nTo climb, keep publishing stronger models and stay ahead.

zh: 「任务」集中展示所有进行中任务的进度, 也能取消它们。\n训练、后训练、评估、数据采集、科技研究、捐助都是任务 —— 它们在对应界面 (模型 / 数据 / 科技 / 慈善) 启动, 占用 lead / 员工 / 算力, 每推进一回合走若干进度, 完成时结算产出。\n这里不新建任务, 只看进度和喊停; 算力 / 人力被占满时, 新任务起不来。
en: Tasks shows the progress of everything currently running, and lets you cancel them.\nTraining, post-training, evaluation, data collection, tech research and donations are all tasks — you start them from their own screens (Models / Data / Tech / Charity); they tie up leads / staff / compute, advance some progress each turn, and settle their output on completion.\nYou don't create tasks here — just watch progress and stop them. When compute or staff are fully booked, new tasks can't start.

zh: 「事件」是每隔一段时间触发的卡牌, 给你抉择或随机冲击 (机遇 / 危机 / 行业动态)。\n有待处理的事件时, 顶栏「推进回合」会被锁住 —— 必须先在这里做出选择才能继续推进。\n不同选项有不同的代价与收益, 有的还会留下后续影响; 仔细读再决定。
en: Events are cards that trigger every so often, giving you choices or random shocks (opportunities / crises / industry news).\nWhile an event is pending, the Advance Turn button is locked — you must resolve it here before you can move on.\nDifferent options carry different costs and rewards, and some leave lasting effects; read carefully before deciding.

zh: 「慈善」是后期的现金出口: 向公益方向 (生物科学 / 基础超算 / 失业援助) 阶梯式捐助。\n每次捐助是一个任务: 当周一次性扣钱、可全额抵税, 完成后激活一个小而封顶的长期加成 (如估值乘子 / 营销转化)。每个方向三档, 顺序爬梯、每档只捐一次。\n捐够了还会解锁「宇宙模拟」终极工程。这是钱多了之后的去处, 不是开局重点。
en: Charity is a late-game cash sink: make tiered donations to causes (bio science / fundamental compute / unemployment relief).\nEach donation is a task — it costs cash that week (fully tax-deductible) and, on completion, activates a small capped long-term bonus (e.g. valuation multiplier / marketing conversion). Each cause has three tiers, climbed in order, once each.\nDonate enough and you unlock the 'universe simulation' capstone project. This is where surplus cash goes — not an early-game focus.

zh: 「拍卖行」按当前市价买入收藏品 (限量艺术品 / 卡牌 / 超跑等), 它们是会增值的资产: 市价随游戏日历沿增值曲线上涨 (有上限)。\n买到的藏品在「办公室」的收藏柜里管理, 可按市价卖出 (扣一点抽成)。\n这是把闲钱变成增值资产的玩法, 也是后期 money sink; 办公室里还会陈列你获得的奖杯。
en: The Auction house sells collectibles (limited art / cards / supercars, etc.) at the current market price — they're appreciating assets whose price rises along a value curve as the in-game calendar advances (with a cap).\nWhat you buy is managed in the cabinet in your Office, and can be sold at market price (minus a small fee).\nIt's a way to turn idle cash into appreciating assets and a late-game money sink; your Office also displays the trophies you've earned.
